## Checklist

- [ ] I ran unit tests (`:app:testDebugUnitTest`) or explained why not
- [ ] I considered offline / no-GPS export paths if relevant
- [ ] No secrets, keystores, or `local.properties` included
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Linked related issues (e.g. `Closes #123`)
